boundaries.notes: Long France trip. Index book4 pages 72 (Stalisfield, Suzy, Laon), 73 (Vezelay), 74 (Corbigny/Nivernais), 76 (Paray-le-Monial, Dieu donne), 77 (St Maurice), 78 (Puy-en-Velay), 79 (Entraygues), 80 (Conques), 81 (Figeac/Noux), 82 (Treignac) all match. NOTE: index has marginal '2017' from page 76, but the diary NARRATIVE dates are 2015 (e.g. 'Wednesday July 29th', 'Saturday August 1st') — treat the index year marker as unreliable here. Trip runs through B_0264_L return (Sat 15 Aug, Channel Tunnel, 'saw Charles + Jenny at Oxford, on the way home').

boundaries.notes: Short non-trip day-out entry (no overnight; 'tea in the van' then implicitly home). Index book4 page 85 'Black Country, Omberley' matches. Low confidence: could alternatively be folded into surrounding entries, but it reads as a separate undated day note.

boundaries.notes: Index book4 page 90 'Bromyard, Elan Valley' matches. Trip is OPEN at window end — B_0270_R (Tuesday Aug 13th, Polwigo/Elan Valley) is the last page in the window and does not return home; continues into next window.

open_at_end: Trip starting B_0270_L (farm + Polwigo/Elan Valley, Wales, from Monday August 12th 2016) is still in progress at the end of the window; the family has not returned home.
notes: Page numbers ('no') on right-hand pages run 61-89 and match Volume B book4 index entries (Carnac=58/61 .. Elan Valley=90). IMPORTANT scaffolding caveat: book4's marginal year markers ('2017' from index page 76) DISAGREE with the diary narrative, which carries explicit dates of 2014 (Aug/Oct), 2015 (Apr-Sep) and 2016 (Apr-Aug) across this window. The narrative dates are authoritative for date_guess. Several physical pages are mixed (end of one trip + start of next): B_0244, B_0245, B_0248, B_0250, B_0252, B_0264, B_0265, B_0270.
